items.name_en: Bottega Veneta
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta
Material: Paper Wax Calfskin🍂
Craftsmanship: The Intrecciato technique makes the handbag soft yet durable, with vertical weaving amplifying Bottega's classic DNA✌️❤️
Function: Crossbody, shoulder, or clutch✨👻
Spacious capacity, perfect for daily essentials like an umbrella☂️ and electronics. A top choice for tall individuals.
Model: 691407
Dimensions: 36*23*4.5

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta
This Cassette woven cube bag is simple, handsome, understated yet luxurious.
Latest model features a triangle logo pattern on the side! A very commuting-friendly bag. The design is simple yet showcases BV's classic weaving art, making it very easy to match with everyday outfits. Every color is sophisticated, and all are made of soft lambskin, looking very textured. Stylish and chic when worn.
Crossbody, shoulder, or clutch. Unisex.
Size: 23*15*5.5
Style No.: 80820#

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta 2023 Summer Collection Andiamo (Medium Cashmere) Handbag, a favorite among big-name stars! Liu Wen, Du Juan, Jing Boran, Mikaela, Guo Caijie, and many other stars love this new bag.
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2023 Summer Collection Andiamo (Medium Cashmere) Handbag, a favorite among big-name stars! Liu Wen, Du Juan, Jing Boran, Mikaela, Guo Caijie, and many other stars love this new bag.
ANDIAMO pays homage to classic bag shapes, with every detail visible.
Bottega's design highlights
The lightweight body allows you to feel the nappa calf leather presented by the craftsman's skill.
Under the tanning process, it presents extremely soft leather.
The interior showcases flawless woven craftsmanship!
Simple, stylish, and structured, with strong capacity, practical for daily use!
Let's go! Let's go! Take me away!
No.: 80842
Size: 32×24×12

specs.rawTitle:
Bottega Veneta 2023 Summer Collection Andiamo (Medium Cashmere) Handbag, a favorite among big-name stars! Liu Wen, Du Juan, Jing Boran, Mikaela, Guo Caijie, and many other stars love this new bag.

Size: 32×24×12

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta 2024 Fall New Handbag
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2024 Fall New Handbag
New arrivals from the 2024 Early Autumn collection. The newly launched Let's Go and Kit bags share a similar charm, both featuring a slim, crisp baguette shape. They are sculpted with a three-dimensional structure using Intrecciato woven leather craftsmanship, reimagining classic elements with creative contours. The bag names also have a casual, effortless feel. Let's Go can be worn as a shoulder bag or handbag, with magnets on both sides allowing you to freely adjust the shape from rectangular to trapezoidal for a unique and fun bag.
Style: 796258
Size: 37*13*11.5cm

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Arrival Women's ANDIAMO Handbag with Ramie Wool Toggle [Jump][Jump]. How can a classic style be without a new look? As a heavyweight guest of the Pilot series, the Andiamo abandons its previous elegant and restrained style, entering the winter track with a modern urban vibe. It is chic and retro, perfect for simple outfits in autumn and winter to show a premium feel. Young women can easily carry it, and the interior continues the classic Andiamo design, making it super versatile.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Arrival Women's Mini WALLACE Bag. BV interprets classic bag shapes with special materials every season. The bento bag has been very popular in new arrivals in recent years. The new winter release features lambskin and ramie wool combined, making it a warm and cute winter accessory. Carrying a small bag is convenient and beautiful when wearing thicker clothes.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 new Loop is here!!Many girls who like BV must have owned this Loop bag before, simple appearance, classic weave, small and lightweight shape. This innovation continues the "camera bag" silhouette. Unlike the traditional Loop which can only be worn crossbody, this new version can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, satisfying both styling and daily needs. The large ring buckle allows the bag to be folded for use or used as a handle. The summer heat ☀️ usually lowers people's desire, but a lightweight bag greatly enhances the happiness of traveling 🫧

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Small Zigzag Shoulder Bag. The twisted structure cowhide backpack is unrecognizable as a new BV at first glance, only featuring the classic weave on the strap, making the bag simple and casual yet still stylish. Paired with autumn wear, it instantly recalls last year's popular Mocha style.
